recorded_notes: Hand-crafted fixture for TestCapacityGate_PoolFree. Matches the shape pool.query + pool.dataset.query return on TrueNAS 25.10; trimmed to the fields ListPools + getRootDatasetSpace actually read (id, name, healthy, status, size, and available.parsed). If the real-world response shape drifts the method-allowlist test will flag any new calls; this cassette is the canonical happy-path shape for the autoscaler capacity gate.
